message:
🐛 Fix dashboard load/error handling per Copilot review (#4011) (#4018)

- Distinguish foreground vs background dashboard loads: first load with
  no cached cards is treated as foreground so failures surface a toast,
  while warm refreshes with existing data are background (silent)
- On background refresh failures, preserve current cards instead of
  potentially resetting a persisted dashboard to demo cards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
